titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Anne Rhodes papers,[ca. 1980-1984].
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Anne Rhodes Papers,[ca. 1980-1984]
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2003 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Reviews of their performances, itineraries, programs, and fliers; also, periodical articles concerning women's art events, in many of which they may have participated.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Member, with Barbara Anger, of Mischief Mime, a lesbian feminist performance troupe, from the mid 1970s to the early 1980s.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reviews of their performances, itineraries, programs, and fliers; also, periodical articles concerning women's art events, in many of which they may have participated.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Anne Rhodes papers, #7628. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
